description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher MUST validate workspaceId ownership via fabric at ORDER 1. Component query includes workspaceId + componentName composite key. Cross-workspace access forbidden.
blockConditions: Component query by name alone without workspaceId

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher MUST resolve text variant from FREEDOM config at ORDER 1. Unknown variants return TextVariantNotFound. Variant mapped to canonical font size.
blockConditions: Text variant not resolved from FREEDOM config
Unknown variant not caught at ORDER 1
Hardcoded font size without variant config
passConditions: Canonical font size assigned per variant

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher MUST emit TextElementFetched CloudEvent with componentName, variant, resolvedFontSize, overrides. Emit OverridesApplied event listing all delta-style changes.
blockConditions: Override chain not recorded in event

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher MUST validate workspaceId ownership via fabric at ORDER 1. Cross-workspace component access forbidden. tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage only.
passConditions: Workspace ownership validated via fabric at ORDER 1

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher MUST store text element in xiigen-framer-elements index with knowledgeScope=PRIVATE before emitting events. Record includes workspaceId, componentName, variant, baseStyle, overrides, resolvedStyle.
blockConditions: Element not stored before event emission
Override chain or resolved style missing
passConditions: Complete override chain + resolved style stored

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher requires: (1) Workspace isolation via fabric, (2) Text variant resolution from FREEDOM config, (3) Override resolution + audit, (4) Animation metadata exclusion, (5) CloudEvents emission.
passConditions: T674 uses fabric for workspace isolation

description: T674 FramerTextElementFetcher generation prompt MUST include: (1) Workspace-scoped query via fabric, (2) Text variant resolution from FREEDOM, (3) Override resolution with audit chain, (4) Animation exclusion, (5) CloudEvents emission.
